Title: Ad Autopsy — The Disgusted Question Hook
Content:
"Do you think your bed is clean?"

This hook made Bonlint's UV cleaner ad run for 908 days.

One question. Instant disgust. Unstoppable curiosity.

Here's the anatomy:

→ Assumption attack. Everyone thinks their bed is clean. This line makes you doubt it.
→ Emotional hijack. Disgust is the most powerful scroll-stopper. More than fear. More than desire. You HAVE to know.
→ Visual proof. "It can even remove three thick layers of mites." Now you're imagining mites in YOUR bed.
→ 91 performance score. Top 1% of all ads in the database.

The pattern: Ask a question that makes the viewer feel uncomfortable about something they do every day.

Works for:
- Skincare ("Think your face wash actually works?")
- Supplements ("Know what's really in your multivitamin?")
- Home products ("When did you last clean your pillowcase?")

Disgust sells. Study this.
